signals.title: Flood water rising near east logistics corridor
signals.summary: Three local reports and one regional outlet mention road closures near warehouse access points.

signals.title: Brand hashtag linked to refund scam screenshots
signals.summary: Screenshots of fake refund links are spreading with a brand hashtag and angry customer replies.

signals.title: Event crowd confusion at gate B
signals.summary: Short videos show queue compression and unclear signage near entry gate B.

signals.title: Rumor about contaminated aid packages
signals.summary: Community group posts claim aid packages are unsafe, but no official confirmation exists.

signals.title: Port delay may disrupt medical supply route
signals.summary: Shipping RSS feeds and vendor updates indicate delay in cold-chain medical supplies.

auditTrail.reason: Risk raised because severity and credibility were both above 80 with negative sentiment.
auditTrail.recommendation: Open logistics continuity room and publish road-closure advisory.
